ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "tweet_index" TEXT /* Index of the tweet (timestamp) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) the tweet has received */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Mentioned users in the tweet */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geolocation data for the tweet */,
  "permalink" TEXT /* Permalink to the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "reply_to_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "reply_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being replied to */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* Type of the tweet (e.g., retweet, reply) */,
  "tweet_url" TEXT /* URL of the tweet */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the tweet is a retweet */,
  "in_reply_to_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_username FOREIGN KEY ("username") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user's profile */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the user */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the user */,
  "profile_background_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile background image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the mention */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "mention_username" TEXT /* Username of the mentioned user */,
  "mention_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the hashtag (number of times used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being retweeted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user retweeting the tweet */,
  "retweet_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the retweet occurred */,
  "retweet_type" TEXT /* Type of retweet (e.g., retweet, modified retweet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being favorited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user favoriting the tweet */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the favorite occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Sentiment type (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_classification" TEXT /* Classification of sentiment (e.g., happy, sad, angry) */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of sentiment analysis (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tweets" (
  "event_tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event tweet */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the tweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tweets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
